allow: PowerShell($src = "c:\\Users\\anmar\\Documents\\AG-CL-JARVIS.project\\brand_kit_extracted\\jarvis-brand-agent-kit"; $proj = "c:\\Users\\anmar\\Documents\\AG-CL-JARVIS.project"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path "$proj\\public\\assets" | Out-Null; Copy-Item "$src\\assets\\jarvis-ai-logo-reference.jpeg" "$proj\\public\\assets\\jarvis-ai-logo-reference.jpeg"; Copy-Item "$src\\CLAUDE.md" "$proj\\CLAUDE.md"; Get-ChildItem "$proj\\public\\assets","$proj\\CLAUDE.md" | Select-Object FullName,Length)

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/" -MaximumRedirection 0 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } catch { $r = $_.Exception.Response }; "Root status: $\($r.StatusCode\) location: $\($r.Headers.Location\)"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; try { $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/en/login" -ErrorAction Stop -UseBasicParsing } catch { "Login error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)"; $r2 = $null }; if \($r2\) { "Login status: $\($r2.StatusCode\) bytes: $\($r2.Content.Length\)" })
